claim_bullets.bullet_text: This type of solution provided an excellent opportunity to explore lazy versus eager evaluation, the performance of iterators versus native iteration, single responsibility design, and many other rich topics. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.269-270)

source_record_text: The 'the aftermath' chapter from JavaScript Allongé explores a coding interview scenario and its aftermath, highlighting topics such as lazy versus eager evaluation and single responsibility design.
